title: HEIR — Hub Environment Identity Record
description: Strict flat schema for heir.doctrine.yaml validation. Garage validates this during mount protocol step_2b_heir_validation. Child repos declare identity only — all validation is centralized in the Garage.

doctrine_version.description: Doctrine version this HEIR record conforms to. Must be compatible with Garage doctrine_version.json.

sovereign_id.description: CC-01 sovereign identity reference. Immutable after creation.

hub_id.description: CC-02 hub unique identifier. Immutable. Must match repo_registry entry if available.

ctb_placement.description: CTB hierarchy position for this hub.

imo_topology.description: IMO layer this hub primarily operates at.

services.description: List of service names declared by this hub.

secrets_provider.description: Secrets management provider (e.g., doppler). All secrets must be sourced from this provider.

acceptance_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria for this hub. At least one required.
